content: TASK-068 checkpoint done: Added the user's dense branch-heavy screenflow sample as test/fixtures/screenflow-complex.archmap and hardened Prototype map layout for it. Flow-map nodes now carry depth/row metadata, different-depth transitions prefer left/right side ports, endpoint ports are sorted by the opposite node position, column/row gaps are widened, and shared inter-column/inter-row route lanes are assigned globally instead of per-source only. This reduces the tangled shared trunks seen in branch-heavy screenflow maps while preserving the TASK-067 perpendicular source/target stubs and TASK-066 buildEdgePaths overlap handling. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts (9 tests, including the dense sample), and npm run build passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; dense Prototype render still takes ~2s in the targeted test.
